allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./api/_emailTemplate.js'\).then\(m => { const html = m.renderTicketHtml\({ tripType: 'Round trip', from: 'JFK New York', to: 'LHR London', departure: '2026-05-10', returnDate: '2026-05-18', passengers: '2 Passengers', cabin: 'Business', name: 'Stefan', email: 'test@example.com', notes: 'Window seat preferred, vegetarian meals' }\); console.log\('Subject:', m.renderTicketSubject\({ from: 'JFK', to: 'LHR' }\)\); console.log\('HTML length:', html.length\); console.log\('Contains crimson:', html.includes\('#8A194F'\)\); console.log\('Contains JFK:', html.includes\('JFK'\)\); console.log\('Contains Stefan:', html.includes\('Stefan'\)\); console.log\('Contains notes:', html.includes\('Window seat'\)\); }\).catch\(err => { console.error\('FAIL:', err.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "import\('./api/quote.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('Default export type:', typeof m.default\); }\).catch\(err => { console.error\('FAIL:', err.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./api/_emailTemplate.js'\).then\(m => { const html = m.renderTicketHtml\({ tripType: 'One way', from: 'Dubai \(DXB\)', to: 'Tokyo HND', departure: '2026-06-12', passengers: '1 Passenger', cabin: 'First', name: 'Maya', email: 'maya@gmail.com' }\); require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('preview-ticket.html', html\); console.log\('Wrote preview-ticket.html'\); }\);")

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5175/api/quote -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"tripType":"Round trip","from":"JFK New York","to":"LHR London","departure":"2026-05-15","returnDate":"2026-05-22","passengers":"2 Passengers","cabin":"Business","name":"Stefan Test","email":"grozavradustefan@gmail.com","phone":"+40 700 000 000","notes":"Window seat preferred, vegetarian meals"}' -w "\\n---\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")
